senses.gloss: a female given name, Maryam, equivalent to English Mary or Miriam, Latin Marīa, or French Marie; Mary, mother of Jesus
a female given name, Maryam, equivalent to English Mary or Miriam, Latin Marīa, or French Marie; Miriam, sister of Moses and Aaron
a female given name, Maryam, equivalent to English Mary or Miriam, Latin Marīa, or French Marie; The 19th sura (chapter) of the Qur'an.
